vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: While I value comfort, I cannot deny that the aesthetic appeal of a sleek pair of leather boots often influences my final decision.

vocab.meaning: sự hỗ trợ chỉnh hình (tốt cho cấu trúc xương bàn chân)
vocab.example: As I've grown older, I prioritize footwear that offers excellent orthopedic support to prevent back pain after a long day.

vocab.meaning: hy sinh sự thoải mái vì thời trang
vocab.example: In my teenage years, I was guilty of sacrificing comfort for fashion, often wearing ill-fitting shoes just because they were on-trend.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế linh hoạt (dễ phối đồ)
vocab.example: I tend to gravitate towards shoes with a versatile design that can seamlessly transition from a casual brunch to a formal meeting.

vocab.meaning: các đặc điểm công thái học (tối ưu cho cơ thể)
vocab.example: High-end running shoes are packed with ergonomic features that minimize the impact on your joints during a sprint.
Shoes crafted from premium materials like top-grain leather tend to be more supple and comfortable in the long run.

vocab.meaning: tận dụng được ưu điểm của cả hai (vừa đẹp vừa thoải mái)
vocab.example: Finding a pair of loafers that look sharp but feel like slippers is truly having the best of both worlds.

vocab.meaning: độ bền và tuổi thọ sử dụng
vocab.example: I consider comfortable shoes to be a better investment because of their superior durability and longevity compared to flimsy high-fashion items.
If money were no object, I would exclusively wear tailor-made shoes to ensure an impeccable fit and a unique look.

vocab.meaning: lớp đệm và khả năng giảm xóc
vocab.example: When choosing walking shoes, I look for advanced cushioning and shock absorption to protect my heels.
